n: Vale of Sorcery: The Trial of Death

steps.t: The Altar of Death can be found in the Circle of Death in Minas Morgul. You should enter the Altar of Death.
The Altar of Death can be found in the Circle of Death in Minas Morgul. You should examine the conflict around the altar.
The Altar of Death can be found in the Circle of Death in Minas Morgul. You should examine the altar.
Rally points can be found throughout the Morgul Vale. You should seek out each rally point within the bounds of the Morgul Vale.
Thargaun can be found at Ufurok in Thuringwath. You should seek out Thargaun there.
Thargaun can be found at Ufurok in Thuringwath. You should confront Thargaun there.
Thargaun can be found at Ufurok in Thuringwath. You should trap Thargaun.
Thargaun's ritual can be found at Ufurok in Thuringwath. You should stop Thargaun's ritual.
The Orb of Death be found at Ufurok in Thuringwath. You should destroy the Orb of Death.
Thurindol can be found at Echad Uial. You should talk to Thurindol.
